title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 5th June 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Stable / dividend play; being a housing-finance company it won't give multibagger or big gains. Be cautious as rates change.
recommendations.detail: HOLD as a stable stock only — don't expect multibagger returns; it's a housing-finance company so no spectacular profits, it behaves more like a dividend play. Be a little cautious now that interest rates are changing.

recommendations.note: Not a great stock; poor past returns, writing instruments out of fashion. Avoid; exit on rallies.
recommendations.detail: AVOID. Not a great stock — it didn't give great returns before and unlikely to in future, since writing instruments aren't in fashion unless there's a value/gift-items angle. Exit on rallies.

recommendations.note: Renewable-space stock; a bit dull recently but definitely hold.
recommendations.detail: HOLD. Stocks in the renewable space should all be held; it's been a bit dull for a few days (like Waaree) but definitely hold.

recommendations.note: Renewable-space stock; dull recently but hold.
recommendations.detail: HOLD. Same renewable-space view — dull for a few days but definitely hold.

recommendations.note: Dull counter (Damani stake); cigarette + rising non-cigarette income, but stays range-bound, no big gains.
recommendations.detail: HOLD but range-bound. A dull counter; Damani has a stake (pushes it up then it comes off). Non-cigarette income is also rising, but I think it stays range-bound from here and won't give big gains.

recommendations.note: Large-cap; hold only with a very long-term outlook, else shift to mid/small-caps.
recommendations.detail: HOLD. A large-cap that needs patience — hold only with a very long-term outlook; if concerned about non-performance, shift into mid/small-caps.

recommendations.note: Large-cap; long-term/patience, hold (or rotate to mid/small-caps if concerned).
recommendations.detail: HOLD. Large-cap needing patience and a very long-term outlook; hold, or rotate into mid/small-caps if worried about underperformance.
HOLD. Large-cap needing patience and a very long-term outlook; hold, or rotate into mid/small-caps if concerned.

recommendations.note: Holdable ~1 year as environment turns positive, but high-risk; use a trailing stop-loss.
recommendations.detail: HOLD for about a year as the environment turns positive, but remember there's risk; with high risk appetite, hold carefully with a trailing stop-loss while watching the market.

recommendations.note: Holdable ~1 year as environment turns positive, but high-risk; use a trailing stop-loss.
recommendations.detail: HOLD for about a year given the positive environment, but there's risk; with high risk appetite, hold carefully with a trailing stop-loss.

recommendations.note: Underperformer; only-of-its-kind credit-card play but market never fancied it; wealth creation doubtful.
recommendations.detail: Underperformer. The only-one-of-its-kind listed credit-card entity, yet the market never fancied it — it didn't rise on decent results and doesn't fall much on negatives; I doubt it creates much wealth.
